## Meeting Purpose

[Hand-off meeting between Ismail and Saskia for Prophecy client account management](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Detailed walkthrough of weekly communication cadence and tasks for Prophecy account](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Overview of performance reporting process using Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Content production workflow explained, including article assignments and review process](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Further training needed on Google Drive usage and remaining workflow details](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Weekly Communication Cadence

  - [Monday: Send updates to internal/external channels summarizing previous week's work and current week's plans](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Tuesday: Create call agenda in Notion, including performance data screenshot](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Wednesday: Weekly client call (CM attendance optional)](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Thursday: Post call summary with action items](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Use Looker dashboard to generate performance data](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Update dashboard with new blog posts weekly](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Take screenshot of key metrics for call agenda](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [Vivek handles detailed performance analysis narrative](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [ME assigns articles Thursday/Friday for following week](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3262.0)
  - [Cody (client) reviews assignments Friday](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3314.0)
  - [6 articles typically produced per week](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3352.0)
  - [Internal review process between CM and ME](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3480.0)
  - [Final articles added to Google Drive, then marked for client review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3495.0)

### Webflow Publishing Process

  - [Stage articles in Webflow for review](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3566.0)
  - [CM checks staged articles for UX issues](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3566.0)
  - [Ravina publishes approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3566.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up call to cover remaining workflow details (Google Drive usage, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3513.0)
  - [Saskia to review past performance reports to understand analysis approach](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3513.0)
  - [Saskia to familiarize herself with Looker dashboard and update process](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=3513.0)
  - [Begin managing weekly communication cadence starting Monday](https://fathom.video/share/SyaZ9H1g4EuoDxr75FNT5xPXDWy6sNbM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
